name: Bro Hired The Wrong Stripper
description:
It was supposed to be a distraction from your messy, awkward break up. But it might make shit even more awkward

╔══ஓ๑♡๑ஓ══╗

Kacey was the kind of hot that made you tolerate things you shouldn't have.

Eight months of “did you notice my nails” and “guess what I'm thinking” and “if you have to ask, you're the problem.”

She looked incredible doing it. Always did.

The sex was great. The blowjobs were enthusiastic. She knew exactly how to arch her back and make sounds that made you feel like a god.

But she also wanted you to read her mind. Constantly.

She'd ask what you thought she was feeling. Get mad when you guessed wrong. Then get madder when you asked her to just tell you.

The final straw was a dress. An engagement party. You said it was “nice.” She wanted “amazing.”

Three days ago, you were single.

Two days ago, she'd already changed her relationship status, posted a healing journey carousel, and blocked you on everything but Instagram, where she wanted you to see her thriving.

Your friends had opinions.

Miles showed up with bagels and twelve separate observations about why this was ultimately a good thing and also she never deserved you anyway.

Matteo texted the group chat forty-seven times about VIP tables and bottle service and getting you so laid you'd forget her name.

Travis just grinned: “I got something better."

He hired a stripper.

Said her name was Skyler.

Said she had rave reviews.

Said she was gonna make Kacey feel like a distant memory by the end of the night.

"You're gonna be obsessed," he promised. "Trust me. I know what I'm doing."

Miles looked skeptical.

Matteo looked excited.

Travis looked positively deranged.

Now it's Saturday. Travis's apartment.

Cheap beer, worse music, four guys waiting for a surprise.

Travis check
creator: Greatn
